summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of refactored WYSIWYG Document Editor (WysiwygDocumentEditor.jsx). The 2,297-line monolithic file was successfully split into 10 sub-components. All 17 features tested and verified working correctly with 100% functional parity maintained.
passed_tests: 3-column layout loads correctly (left sidebar, center document, right sidebar)
Left sidebar 'Leistungen' tab shows services count (13) and items with prices
Left sidebar 'Artikel' tab shows articles count (2) and items
Left sidebar 'Blöcke' tab shows blocks count (1) with 'Ins Dokument' button
Sidebar search input is present and functional
Drag & drop zone (data-testid='document-drop-zone') exists for items
Document header shows 'Tischlerei Graupner seit 1960' branding
Blue company info displayed on right side of header
Customer selection dropdown works (data-testid='wysiwyg-customer-select')
Betreff TextTemplateSelect renders with 'Textbaustein' dropdown
Vortext TextTemplateSelect renders correctly
Positions table renders with Pos, Beschreibung, Menge, Einheit, Einzelpreis, Gesamt columns
Titel rows display with amber/yellow highlighting and hierarchical numbering (1, 2, 3, 4)
Position numbering shows correct hierarchy (1.1, 2.1, 2.2, 2.3, 3.1, 4.1)
Add Position button (data-testid='btn-add-position') works
Add Titel button (data-testid='btn-add-titel') works
Gewerk-/Titelzusammenstellung section shows grouped totals
Totals section shows Nettosumme (270.80 €), Abschlag (3%), Nettobetrag, MwSt (19%), Brutto (312.58 €)
Right sidebar 'Vorlagen' tab shows templates and similar documents
Right sidebar 'Kalkulation' tab shows EK-Preise inputs for margin calculation
Right sidebar 'Übersicht' shows position count (7) and Brutto total (313€)
Toolbar 'Einstellungen' button opens settings slide-over panel
Settings slide-over has 3 tabs: Einstellungen, Leistungen/Artikel, Blöcke
Settings Firmendaten tab shows company info, bank details, tax settings
Toolbar 'Speichern' button is present and functional
Toolbar 'Beenden' button navigates back to list
Schlusstext section renders below totals with TextTemplateSelect
Document footer (data-testid='document-footer') shows company/bank info
New quote page (/quotes/new) loads with customer dropdown visible
Status dropdown shows correct options (Entwurf, Gesendet, Beauftragt, Abgelehnt)
critical_code_review_comments: Refactoring successfully reduced main file from 2,297 lines to 527 lines
All 10 sub-components properly export named exports
Props are correctly passed between parent and child components
State management remains in parent component (WysiwygDocumentEditor.jsx)
All data-testid attributes preserved for testing
No visual or behavioral regressions detected
seed_data_creation: Used existing quote A-2026-0021 with Titel-Gruppen for comprehensive testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: WYSIWYG Document Editor refactoring complete and verified. The editor is accessible at /quotes, /orders, /invoices paths. Edit existing documents at /quotes/edit/{id} or create new at /quotes/new. All 10 sub-components in /app/frontend/src/components/wysiwyg/ are working correctly. Key data-testid attributes: btn-settings-topbar, btn-save-document, btn-add-position, btn-add-titel, tab-services, tab-articles, tab-blocks, tab-vorlagen, tab-kalkulation, wysiwyg-customer-select, document-drop-zone, document-footer, settings-overlay.

components_verified.EditorToolbar.jsx: Toolbar with navigation, settings, voice input, email, print, PDF, save buttons
components_verified.EditorSidebar.jsx: Left sidebar with Leistungen/Artikel/Blöcke tabs, search, draggable items
components_verified.DocumentHeader.jsx: Company branding, customer selection, document metadata
components_verified.PositionsTable.jsx: Positions table with Titel rows, drag-drop reordering, inline editing
components_verified.TotalsSection.jsx: Gewerk-Zusammenstellung, Nettosumme, Abschlag, MwSt, Brutto calculations
components_verified.RightSidebar.jsx: Vorlagen/Kalkulation tabs, document templates, margin calculation
